name: Defense Of Greece TD
short_description: Ancient Greece under siege. Steam engines roar, bronze towers rise, and waves of soldiers and machines march against you.
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

When myths meet machinery, war takes on a new shape. Defense of Greece TD blends the legends of Ancient Greece with the grit of steam engines and the clatter of iron machines. The familiar rules of tower defense come alive here on sun-baked islands, where marble temples stand beside mechanical fortresses.

Sixty battles await across four islands, each with its own paths, choke points and surprises. You will face fourteen types of enemies: infantry rushing the gates, air units crossing the skies, war-bots clanking forward, and ships striking from the sea. To hold the line, you command four classes of towers, each with upgrade paths, and five unique mechanisms that shape their strength.

The battlefield is not only for towers. When the fight grows desperate, you may call lightning from the sky, throw grenades, or scatter tribolo traps to slow the horde. Every intervention feels like turning the tide with your own hand.

Defense of Greece TD does not reinvent the genre, but paints it in different colors. The blend of classical Greece and early machines gives familiar mechanics a new tone—warm, unusual, and at times surprisingly tense. For fans of tower defense, it offers a world worth defending.
